rationale: The recursive definition has no `termination_by` or `decreasing_by` clause; the `3 * n + 1` branch grows, so Lean's auto-inference will fail, which is an explicit Score 2 violation.
rubric_evidence:
| n => if n % 2 = 0 then 1 + collatz_steps (n / 2)
                       else 1 + collatz_steps (3 * n + 1)
